snippet: nmbs Welcome to My SNCB, Denys Maiorov! You are almost ready to start using your My SNCB account. All you have to do is confirm your e-mail address by clicking on 'Confirm your e-mail address'
subject: Welcome to My SNCB - Confirm your e-mail address
body:
Welcome to My SNCB, Denys Maiorov!

You are almost ready to start using your My SNCB account. All you have to do is confirm your e-mail address by clicking on 'Confirm your e-mail address' below.
Confirm your e-mail address
This link will remain valid for 24 hours.

Link expired? Request a new confirmation e-mail.

The MySNCB team
